   "source": [
    "from ROOT import TCanvas, TH1F, TSlider\n",
    "from ROOT import gROOT, gBenchmark, gRandom"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f91e7303",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Create a new canvas, and customize it."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "3000b0d0",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.430774Z",

     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.570406Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.569326Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "c1 = TCanvas( 'c1', 'The HSUM example', 200, 10, 600, 400 )\n",
    "c1.SetGrid();\n",
    "\n",
    "gBenchmark.Start( 'hsum' )"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1de5f3a6",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Create some histograms."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "3c632143",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.572070Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.571938Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.685862Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.685386Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "total  = TH1F( 'total', 'This is the total distribution', 100, -4, 4 )\n",
    "main   = TH1F( 'main', 'Main contributor', 100, -4, 4 )\n",
    "s1     = TH1F( 's1', 'This is the first signal', 100, -4, 4 )\n",
    "s2     = TH1F( 's2', 'This is the second signal', 100, -4, 4 )\n",
    "total.Sumw2()   # this makes sure that the sum of squares of weights will be stored"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "06761a98",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Set canvas/frame attributes."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "f612bf38",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.688159Z",

    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "total.SetMarkerStyle( 21 )\n",
    "total.SetMarkerSize( 0.7 )\n",
    "main.SetFillColor( 16 )\n",
    "s1.SetFillColor( 42 )\n",
    "s2.SetFillColor( 46 )"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f55d00d0",

    "Initialize random number generator."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "04789a02",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,

    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "gRandom.SetSeed()\n",
    "gauss, landau = gRandom.Gaus, gRandom.Landau"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "0d24bf9c",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "for speed, bind and cache the Fill member functions"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "1364aac4",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.915899Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:56.915748Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.019339Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.018873Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "histos = [ 'total', 'main', 's1', 's2' ]\n",
    "for name in histos:\n",
    "   exec('%sFill = %s.Fill' % (name,name))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "1c49e81a",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Fill histograms randomly"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "f264124d",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.021661Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.021523Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.465501Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.465103Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "\n",
       "\n",
       "<div id=\"root_plot_1783395957697\" style=\"width: 600px; height: 400px; position: relative\">\n",
       "</div>\n",
       "\n",
       "<script>\n",
       "   function process_root_plot_1783395957697() {\n",
       "      function execCode(Core) {\n",
       "         Core.settings.HandleKeys = false;\n",
       "         \n",
       "Core.unzipJSON(33869,'').then(json => {\n",
       "   const obj = Core.parse(json);\n",
       "   Core.draw('root_plot_1783395957697', obj, '');\n",
       "});\n",
       "\n",
       "      }\n",
       "      const servers = ['/static/', 'https://root.cern/js/7.11.0/', 'https://jsroot.gsi.de/7.11.0/'],\n",
       "            path = 'build/jsroot';\n",
       "      if (typeof JSROOT !== 'undefined')\n",
       "         execCode(JSROOT);\n",
       "      else if (typeof requirejs !== 'undefined') {\n",
       "         servers.forEach((s,i) => { servers[i] = s + path; });\n",
       "         requirejs.config({ paths: { 'jsroot' : servers } })(['jsroot'],  execCode);\n",
       "      } else {\n",
       "         const config = document.getElementById('jupyter-config-data');\n",
       "         if (config)\n",
       "            servers[0] = (JSON.parse(config.innerHTML || '{}')?.baseUrl || '/') + 'static/';\n",
       "         else\n",
       "            servers.shift();\n",
       "         function loadJsroot() {\n",
       "            return !servers.length ? 0 : import(servers.shift() + path + '.js').catch(loadJsroot).then(() => execCode(JSROOT));\n",
       "         }\n",
       "         loadJsroot();\n",
       "      }\n",
       "   }\n",
       "   process_root_plot_1783395957697();\n",
       "</script>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "<IPython.core.display.HTML object>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "kUPDATE = 500\n",
    "for i in range( 10000 ):\n",
    " # Generate random values.\n",
    "   xmain = gauss( -1, 1.5 )\n",
    "   xs1   = gauss( -0.5, 0.5 )\n",
    "   xs2   = landau( 1, 0.15 )\n",
    "   mainFill( xmain )\n",
    "\n",
    " # Fill histograms.\n",
    "   s1Fill( xs1, 0.3 )\n",
    "   s2Fill( xs2, 0.2 )\n",
    "   totalFill( xmain )\n",
    "   totalFill( xs1, 0.3 )\n",
    "   totalFill( xs2, 0.2 )\n",
    "\n",
    " # Update display every kUPDATE events.\n",
    "   if i and (i%kUPDATE) == 0 :\n",
    "      if i == kUPDATE :\n",
    "         total.Draw( 'e1p' )\n",
    "         main.Draw( 'same' )\n",
    "         s1.Draw( 'same' )\n",
    "         s2.Draw( 'same' )\n",
    "         c1.Update()\n",
    "         slider = TSlider( 'slider', 'test', 4.2, 0, 4.6, total.GetMaximum(), 38 )\n",
    "         slider.SetFillColor( 46 )\n",
    "\n",
    "      if slider:\n",
    "         slider.SetRange( 0, float(i) / 10000. )\n",
    "\n",
    "      c1.Modified()\n",
    "      c1.Update()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "763d5baf",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Destroy member functions cache."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "17e48b26",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.471905Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.471676Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.580917Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.580417Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "for name in histos:\n",
    "   exec('del %sFill' % name)\n",
    "del histos"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "f4ced532",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Done, finalized and trigger an update."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "712ce0b6",
   "metadata": {
    "collapsed": false,
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.582589Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.582453Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.699114Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.698705Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "hsum      : Real Time =   1.13 seconds Cpu Time =   0.64 seconds\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "slider.SetRange( 0, 1 )\n",
    "total.Draw( 'sameaxis' ) # to redraw axis hidden by the fill area\n",
    "c1.Modified()\n",
    "c1.Update()\n",
    "\n",
    "gBenchmark.Show( 'hsum' )"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "177fb8cc",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "Draw all canvases "
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "a3300922",

     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.817160Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T03:45:57.816771Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "\n",
       "\n",
       "<div id=\"root_plot_1783395957815\" style=\"width: 600px; height: 400px; position: relative\">\n",
       "</div>\n",
       "\n",
       "<script>\n",
       "   function process_root_plot_1783395957815() {\n",
       "      function execCode(Core) {\n",
       "         Core.settings.HandleKeys = false;\n",
       "         \n",
       "Core.unzipJSON(33869,'').then(json => {\n",
       "   const obj = Core.parse(json);\n",
       "   Core.draw('root_plot_1783395957815', obj, '');\n",
       "});\n",
       "\n",
       "      }\n",
       "      const servers = ['/static/', 'https://root.cern/js/7.11.0/', 'https://jsroot.gsi.de/7.11.0/'],\n",
       "            path = 'build/jsroot';\n",
       "      if (typeof JSROOT !== 'undefined')\n",
       "         execCode(JSROOT);\n",
       "      else if (typeof requirejs !== 'undefined') {\n",
       "         servers.forEach((s,i) => { servers[i] = s + path; });\n",
       "         requirejs.config({ paths: { 'jsroot' : servers } })(['jsroot'],  execCode);\n",
       "      } else {\n",
       "         const config = document.getElementById('jupyter-config-data');\n",
       "         if (config)\n",
       "            servers[0] = (JSON.parse(config.innerHTML || '{}')?.baseUrl || '/') + 'static/';\n",
       "         else\n",
       "            servers.shift();\n",
       "         function loadJsroot() {\n",
       "            return !servers.length ? 0 : import(servers.shift() + path + '.js').catch(loadJsroot).then(() => execCode(JSROOT));\n",
       "         }\n",
       "         loadJsroot();\n",
       "      }\n",
       "   }\n",
       "   process_root_plot_1783395957815();\n",
       "</script>\n"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "<IPython.core.display.HTML object>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "%jsroot on\n",
    "from ROOT import gROOT \n",
    "gROOT.GetListOfCanvases().Draw()"
   ]
  }
